overall.description: Cinematic third-person footage from a high-fidelity video game showing an armored warrior character in a traditional East Asian temple courtyard. The camera slowly orbits the character, revealing detailed wooden architecture with red pillars and a misty forested mountain backdrop under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with forested mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: warrior character standing in courtyard, slowly rotating to observe surroundings

entered.detail: long wooden structure with curved tiled roof and red support pillars
dense evergreen trees covering hillside with autumn foliage
low stone wall bordering the courtyard edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide temple courtyard with a traditional wooden building on the right and forested mountains in the background. The warrior character stands center frame as the camera begins a slow clockwise orbit, revealing the detailed architecture and natural surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard transitioning to building facade view

events.description: red autumn leaf floats into foreground from bottom right

agents.ego_description: character continues slow rotation, now facing more toward the camera

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its orbit, the temple building moves to center frame while the stone wall passes out of view behind the camera. A red autumn leaf drifts through the foreground, and the forested backdrop begins to shift toward the edge of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional temple building facade with stone courtyard

agents.ego_description: character now faces the camera directly, standing still in the courtyard

entered.detail: traditional stone lantern structure at courtyard edge

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its orbit to show the full facade of the temple building, which now dominates the background. The forested mountains have passed out of view, and a stone lantern structure becomes visible on the right as the character faces the camera directly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise orbit around an armored warrior, shifting the focus from a wide mountain vista to the detailed facade of a traditional temple. It begins in a spacious courtyard with a wooden building to the right and misty, forested mountains filling the background. As the camera rotates, the temple building glides toward the center of the frame while a single red autumn leaf drifts through the foreground and the distant mountains begin to slide out of view. The scene then shifts to reveal the full architecture of the temple dominating the backdrop, with the natural landscape completely replaced by the structure's intricate details. Finally, the movement settles as a stone lantern appears on the right and the warrior faces the camera directly.
